name: mean-reversion-capitulation
description: Second screener: oversold / capitulation candidates during active corrections (5–50% drawdown over ~30–90 days)
notes: YOUR Finwiz hit URLs are generated at runtime with &t=TICKERS by scripts/screen_capitulation.py and scripts/export_finviz_hits.py. Market discovery URLs scan the whole market and will NOT match your local BUY/HOLD list.
